chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail. Appl. No.2510 of 2024 Date Order with signature of the Judge 28.11.2024 Mr. Liaqat Ali Khaskheli, Advocate for applicants. Ms. Rahat Ahsan, Addl. P.G. = O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicants are seeking pre arrest bail in Crime No.512/2024 U/s 496-A,34 PPC of P.S. Khawaja Ajmair Nagri, Karachi. Applicants are present on ad-interim pre arrest bail granted to them vide order dated 29.10.2024 and today matter is fixed for confirmation or otherwise. 2. As per brief facts, complainant is husband of Mst. Naima and lodged this FIR against his inlaws alleging that they have wrongfully kept his wife for the purpose of getting her second marriage. In the investigation, 164 Cr.P.C statement of Mst. Naima has been recorded wherein she has stated that she is residing with her parents and relatives/applicants out of her own free will and choice. It is further informed that she has filed a suit for dissolution of marriage against the complainant. 3. In the above circumstances, learned Addl. P.G. has given no objection to confirmation of ad-interim pre arrest bail to the acused. 4. Accordingly, in view of the no objection extended by learned Addl. P.G and the fact that prima facie the offence alleged against the applicants is not made out, this application is allowed and the ad-interim pre arrest bail granted to the applicants is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. The observations made herein above are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. The Cr. Bail Application is disposed of. J U D G E A.K
